nodes.name: Large wren-babbler
nodes.summary: Large wren-babbler（Turdinus macrodactylus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Large wren-babbler。

nodes.name: Turdinus
nodes.summary: Turdinus（Turdinus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Black-throated wren-babbler、Large wren-babbler、Marbled wren-babbler。

nodes.name: Large wren-babbler
nodes.summary: The large wren-babbler (Turdinus macrodactylus) is a species of bird in the family Pellorneidae. It is found in the Malay Peninsula, Sumatra and Java. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest. It is threatened by habitat loss. References Collar, N. J. & Robson, C. 2007. Family Timaliidae (Babblers) pp. 70 – 291 in; del Hoyo, J., Elliott, A. & Christie, D.A. eds. Handbook of the Birds of the World, Vol. 12. Picathartes to Tits and Chickadees. Lynx Edicions, Barcelona.
